creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
Hello, thanks for submitting the port. I found some things that will need to be modified.


- *_DEPENDS and USES should not have the set default (?).
- According to the setup.py there are no build dependencies, only runtime depends.
- There is a missing depend, enum-compat.
- The pkg-descr is pretty much the same as the COMMENT, please make pkg-descr closer match the git README.
